title: The Agenda: From Ceasefire to Real Peace
description:
Join Helga Zepp-LaRouche in her live dialogue and discuss the issues and solutions that move the world and its people. Send your questions & comments to questions@schillerinstitute.org or post them during live stream.
Join the 151st meeting of the International Peace Coalition, Friday, April 24, 11 am ET/ 5 pm CET
https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/ipc_meeting
